text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Eishin Flash has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A hot spring getaway?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've held onto the ticket ever since Eishin Flash
won it at the raffle. I suggest now is a good time
to use it since her schedule's calmed down.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is a valid point. Let's add the vacation into
the schedule, then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to rearrange all my plans to work around
this, so I'll have to think about when would be
best to—
choice_data_list: How about going on your day off next week?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But... I have already allocated that day to do
some film study.
choice_data_list: But you haven't written a location, right?
But you haven't written a location, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It does not, no. I did not indicate where, exactly,
I should do my film study.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well. Let's go to the hot spring on that day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sorry. Were you waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had planned on doing few hundred-second dips
in the water, but I think I soaked for too long.
choice_data_list: Sounds like you enjoyed it then.
Sounds like you enjoyed it then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I did. I had forgotten how hot Japanese hot
springs are...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Could we step outside for a moment to cool off?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The night air is so crisp...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No. In fact, I feel very comfortable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hier bin ich Mensch, hier darf ich's sein...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A famous poem from Germany. I felt a sudden
urge to recite it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I seem to be in a sentimental mood. The heat
from the bath still has me feeling a little
light-headed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What's worse is that I feel lax moments like this
are actually... acceptable.
choice_data_list: They are, once in a while.
They are, once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Would it be all right if I have you listen, without
any judgment?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Then please indulge me for a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will continue striving to become the right,
perfect version of myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, it will most likely take my entire life to
achieve that state of perfection...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I cannot accept this flawed, yet-in-progress
version of myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Which is why I wish for you to be at my side.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am my own harshest critic. However, if you are
there to validate my progress...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can move forward.
choice_data_list: You're always doing great in my eyes.
You're always doing great in my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The day we first met, I had pushed myself too
hard and failed.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: But even that had meaning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After all, it was because I overexerted myself for
the sake of reaching perfection that I came to
meet you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This time spent together feels like a safe haven
we built—just for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Eishin Flash and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
